buildWebsite.title: We’ll build a website that works for you
buildWebsite.desc: Your new website won’t just look good — it will be thoughtfully designed to build trust and encourage visitors to get in touch.

items.desc: Our marketing team crafts clear, compelling content that highlights your value and guides visitors toward action.
We design a custom visual experience tailored to your brand — whether you prefer a clean, modern, or timeless look.
Every section is carefully structured to help you stand out from competitors and turn visits into real enquiries.

about.title: Web Lab
about.text: We are a compact but powerful team of software and systems engineers, graphic designers, and makers. Our passion is building digital products that blend performance, functionality, and aesthetics.

items.desc: From marketing sites to complex web apps built for growth.

tech.title: Technologies
tech.desc: We follow the latest industry trends, but rely on proven tech that delivers stability and long-term sustainability. Our approach blends innovation with safety: we use modern languages and frameworks while ensuring solutions remain scalable and reliable.
tech.stack: We work with: C, C++, Rust, Java, Spring Boot, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Next.js, React, Linux, and many other tools.
tech.philosophy: Trend + stability: modern tools on proven foundations.

items.title: Full product build
items.desc: Need a project from start to finish? We define a clear plan and deliver to your goals.

items.title: Maintenance + hosting
items.desc: Want peace of mind? We handle servers, security, backups, and monitoring on a fixed monthly or yearly fee.

items.title: On-demand maintenance
items.desc: Need occasional help? We respond fast and bill by agreement to keep things running smoothly.

items.title: SaaS rental model
items.desc: Want the software without the infrastructure? We build, host, and maintain it while you pay a flexible subscription.

items.title: Websites for local and international clients
items.desc: Showcasing brands with fast, clear, and conversion-ready sites.

items.title: High-performance apps for industry and e-commerce
items.desc: Systems built to handle traffic spikes and complex operations.

items.title: Microservice architectures for scalable systems
items.desc: Modular platforms that grow with your business.

servers.title: Servers
servers.desc: Our infrastructure is distributed across Germany, Canada, Croatia, and Bosnia and Herzegovina, with ongoing expansion for global availability.

hero.title: Open Source integrator
hero.description: Open source brings freedom, flexibility, and security - but setting it up and maintaining it can be challenging. We are your open source integrator: we handle integration, hosting, and security so you can use the tools without technical complications.
hero.seoDescription: Open source brings freedom and security, but setup and maintenance can be challenging. We integrate, host, and protect open source tools.

items.title: Open source integration
items.desc: Open source system integration tailored to your needs.

items.title: Cloud hosting
items.desc: Cloud hosting with full infrastructure support.

items.title: Security
items.desc: SSL certificates, DDoS protection, and VPN channels.

items.title: Backup systems
items.desc: Backups and offsite backups for full reliability.

items.title: Self-hosted support
items.desc: Self-hosted support within your network (availability depends on location).

tools.title: Supported tools
tools.description: The choice of open source solutions is huge. To make selection easier, we prepared a portfolio of already integrated systems - from collaboration and communication to CRM, ERP, and analytics. We can integrate other solutions on request.

items.title: Collaboration and communication
items.desc: Collaboration tools for teams, projects, and internal communication.

items.desc: Platforms for operational processes, reporting, and analytics.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Pricing for integration services is available on request. Cloud hosting is billed by resource usage: CPU, RAM, Disk, and Traffic. We can prepare a tailored estimate.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For a tailored offer, fill out our contact form and our team will get back to you with details.
